results.question: Which country shows the most dramatic drop in the percentage of spirits consumption in a very short period of time?
results.prediction: Costa Rica. Its spirits consumption (shown in blue) drops dramatically from roughly 70–75% down to about 25–30% of total alcohol consumption in a very short period — approximately 2005–2010 — representing the most abrupt and steep decline in spirits visible across all countries in the chart.
